themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Thy father made our yoke grievous: now therefore ease thou somewhat the grievous servitude of...".
